compiled_state.title: Implement ticket_create in library and wire dispatcher
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: ## Testing Mode RED ## What to Implement Add ticket_create to plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh and wire dispatcher create case. ## Scope (ticket-create.sh is 300 lines — the most complex pure-bash op) ticket_create [--parent <id>] [--priority <p>] [--description <desc>] [--tags <tags>] [--assignee <a>]: - Parse all flag args matching current ticket-create.sh interface - If DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1: exec bash $SCRIPT_DIR/ticket-create.sh "$@"; return $? - Pure bash: generate 8-char hex ticket_id (via od/xxd); write CREATE event via write_commit_event; output ticket_id to stdout - Preserve all validation (type enum, priority range, title length ≤255) - Use return (not exit) for all error paths Dispatcher change: replace exec bash .../ticket-create.sh with _ticketlib_dispatch ticket_create "$@" ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] ticket_create defined in ticket-lib-api.sh Verify: grep -q "^ticket_create" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh - [ ] ticket_create outputs a valid ticket_id to stdout (8 hex chars, dash-separated like abcd-1234) Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib-api.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "PASS.*create" - [ ] DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 routes to ticket-create.sh Verify: grep -A5 "ticket_create" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh | grep -q "DSO_TICKET_LEGACY" - [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh

comments.body: AC amendment (gap-3): ticket_create ID generation: (a) generate >=1000 IDs in tight loop, assert zero duplicates and correct format ^[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}$; (b) when collision injected (pre-seeded ID), ticket_create must detect and retry rather than overwrite. Add these as explicit ACs.
comments.author: Test
